---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `immortal start ...`
2. Send event / trigger condition
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or logs.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.22]
- Immortal version: [e.g. 0.2.0]

## Additional context
Any other context — config files, screenshots, stack traces.
